title: Calibrations
description: The calibration services of the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) are designed to help the makers and users of precision instruments achieve the highest possible levels of measurement quality and productivity.
text:
Shop for your Calibration Service on the New Storefront
On March 27, 2019, NIST introduced a new online shopping experience to order Calibration services. As NIST is committed to providing high quality products and services, we are sure you will enjoy this new customer experience! To access the new NIST storefront and shop for Calibration Services, click here. To place an order, be sure to check out the New Customer link and information on the storefront homepage and register for an account.
What if I Need Assistance?
If you have questions about ordering a measurement service, please email the calibrations [at] nist.gov (Calibrations Group) or call 1-866-NIST-SHOP (or 1-866-647-8746). You may also contact our NIST Calibration Administrators: martin.wilson [at] nist.gov (Martin Wilson) - 301-975-2356 or wendy.bailey [at] nist.gov (Wendy Bailey) - 303-497-3842.
Who Do I Call?
